### 📚 Core Concept Coverage
- [ ] Read standard foundational textbooks & add data to primary notes.
- [ ] Cross-reference current affairs and updates over the past 12 months.

### 📝 Practice & Synthesis
- [ ] Deconstruct and solve the last 10 years of Prelims PYQs.
- [ ] Write 2 Mains descriptive answers under timed conditions.

### 💾 Asset Creation
- [ ] Condense all findings into a **1-page core revision sheet** for rapid review.

### 🔄 Spaced Revision Ledger
- [ ] **R1 (Day 1):** Active Recall Active Review
- [ ] **R2 (Day 3):** Rapid Mental Summary Mapping
- [ ] **R3 (Day 7):** Solve 10 MCQs + 1 Mains Answer Framework
